productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Spry Dark Navy Black Sandal
description: CompositionLightweight navy blue and black outdoor sandals made of synthetic leather with stylish embossing, support back strap and non-marking outsoleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine wash This premium pair of outdoor sandals from adidas is loaded with subtle and stylish embossing making it a perfect footwear for casual occasions. The support back strap snugly fits around your ankle, giving your feet ample grip and comfort, while the non-marking outsole made of rubber ensures optimum grip and support. Use it with wollen socks during winters and flaunt your feet bar during summers for that casual look.
